use_codes.desc: METHOD OF TREATING AN AFFECTIVE DISORDER SUCH AS DEPRESSION
METHOD OF TREATING DEPRESSION OR MAJOR DEPRESSIVE DISORDER
USE IN THE TREATMENT OF MAJOR DEPRESSIVE DISORDER TO IMPROVE PROCESSING SPEED, AN ASPECT OF COGNITIVE FUNCTION
USE IN THE TREATMENT OF MAJOR DEPRESSIVE DISORDER TO IMPROVE TREATMENT EMERGENT SEXUAL DYSFUNCTION (TESD) INDUCED BY PRIOR SEROTONIN REUPTAKE INHIBITOR TREATMENT
USE OF TRINTELLIX FOR THE TREATMENT OF MAJOR DEPRESSIVE DISORDER (MDD) IN ADULTS

indications.text:
1.1Major Depressive Disorder
TRINTELLIX is indicated for the treatment of major depressive disorder (MDD). The efficacy of
TRINTELLIX was established in six 6 to 8 week studies (including one study in the elderly) and
one maintenance study in adults [see Clinical Studies (14)].

1.1 Major Depressive Disorder
BRINTELLIX is indicated for the treatment of major depressive disorder (MDD). The efficacy of
BRINTELLIX was established in six 6 to 8 week studies (including one study in the elderly) and
one maintenance study in adults [see Clinical Studies (14)].
7.2 Effect of TRINTELLIX on Other Drugs

1.1 Major Depressive Disorder
TRINTELLIX is indicated for the treatment of major depressive disorder (MDD) in adults [see
Clinical Studies (14)].
